caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a studio setting, wearing black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Sleepy" above the word "Translation". He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a black adjustable boom arm. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels. As the sequence progresses, the man is seen speaking, his facial expressions shifting from a neutral, focused look to a slight open-mouthed expression and finally into a smile. He remains in the same position throughout, facing toward the left side of the frame while interacting with someone or something off-screen. Tattoos are visible on his right arm, which rests near the microphone stand.
